mission.title: Weekly Pod & Service Health Check
mission.description: Recurring orbit mission that verifies pod and service health across all namespaces. Detects crash-looping containers, pending pods, and services with no healthy endpoints. Run weekly to catch issues before they affect users.

steps.title: Check for non-running pods
steps.description: List all pods that are not in a Running or Succeeded state. These may be crash-looping, pending, or stuck in an error state.

steps.title: Detect containers with high restart counts
steps.description: Identify pods with containers that have restarted more than 5 times, indicating potential crash-loop or OOM issues.
commands: kubectl get pods -A -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{.metadata.namespace}/{.metadata.name} restarts={range .status.containerStatuses[*]}{.restartCount} {end}{"\n"}{end}' | awk '{for(i=2;i<=NF;i++) if($i+0 > 5) print $0}'

validation.command: kubectl get pods -A -o jsonpath='{range .items[*]}{range .status.containerStatuses[*]}{.restartCount}{"\n"}{end}{end}' | awk '$1 > 5' | wc -l

steps.title: Check for services with no endpoints
steps.description: Find services that have no backing endpoints, which means traffic sent to these services will fail.
commands: kubectl get endpoints -A -o json | jq -r '.items[] | select((.subsets // []) | length == 0) | "\(.metadata.namespace)/\(.metadata.name)"'

validation.command: kubectl get endpoints -A -o json | jq '[.items[] | select((.subsets // []) | length == 0)] | length'

steps.title: Verify node readiness
steps.description: Ensure all nodes in the cluster are in Ready condition and not under resource pressure.

validation.command: kubectl get nodes --no-headers | grep -v ' Ready' | wc -l

steps.title: Check recent warning events
steps.description: Review warning-level events from the last hour that may indicate emerging problems.

resolution.summary: Pod and service health check complete. All non-running pods, high-restart containers, and endpoint-less services have been identified.

prerequisites.description: Requires kubectl with cluster access and jq for JSON parsing.
